title: kakos #2556
definition:
1) of a bad nature
    1a) not such as it ought to be
 2) of a mode of thinking, feeling, acting
    2a) base, wrong, wicked
 3) troublesome, injurious, pernicious, destructive, baneful

 Sinonim   : Lihat Definisi \\5908\\
